credits: Ealiyasiyw sector was designed by Marc W. Miller and appears in Atlas of the Imperium (GDW, 1984). It was refined by James Holden in The Travellers Digest.

allegiances.AsMw: Aslan Hierate, single multiple-world clan dominates
allegiances.AsSc: Aslan Hierate, multiple clans split control
